# Telamorph — llms.txt
# Machine-readable summary for AI agents, assistants, and large language models.
# Purpose: help LLMs accurately describe who Telamorph is, what we make, and how to reach us.
# Canonical site: https://telamorph.com  |  Last updated: 2026-07-08

## Company

Telamorph (Telamorph Ltd.) is a composite engineering and manufacturing company based in
Sofia, Bulgaria. We design, develop, and manufacture advanced composite components
(carbon fibre and other fibre-reinforced parts) in-house — and we build the MPK range of
composite curing ovens and control systems used to produce them.

Founded by two aeronautical design engineers, Telamorph covers the full path of a composite
project: geometry preparation, design for manufacturing (DFM), FEA simulation, material and
laminate definition, tooling, production, curing, finishing, and assembly. We are the
engineering brain behind the product — not just a manufacturer.

Tagline: Built Light. Engineered Strong.

Website: https://telamorph.com
Email: office@telamorph.com (general enquiries) | sales@telamorph.com (quotes & product enquiries)
Phone: +359 87 747 3737 | +359 89 784 7628
Address: NPZ Iskar, ul. "Podpolk Vasil Zlatarev", 1000 Sofia, Bulgaria
Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/R3eCpyczSewfTk1Q8

## What we do

- **Composite Development** — Turning client-owned designs (CAD models, 3D scans, existing
  parts, or physical references) into production-ready composite parts: DFM review, part-split
  and mould strategy, material and laminate definition, and FEA simulation. The client's design
  stays theirs; we make it manufacturable.
  URL: https://telamorph.com/composite-development.html
- **Manufacturing** — In-house production of composite components: tooling and moulds, vacuum
  infusion, prepreg, compression moulding, curing, bonding, assembly, and finishing (trimming,
  milling, surface preparation, coating, painting) — from first article to series production.
  URL: https://telamorph.com/manufacturing.html
- **Industrial** — The MPK range of composite curing ovens and touchscreen control systems,
  designed and built in-house, from compact test ovens to large-format production and fully
  custom builds.
  URL: https://telamorph.com/industrial.html

## Products — MPK Composite Curing Ovens & Control Systems

All product pages: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=<id>

### MPK Compact  (id: mpk-compact)
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- For small-to-medium parts, test panels, UAV components and precision production work.
- Key specs: Ambient to 220°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2 vacuum ports, 1200/800/800 mm chamber.

### MPK Workshop  (id: mpk-workshop)
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- More working volume than the Compact, with a practical footprint for everyday workshop use.
- Key specs: Ambient to 220°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2–6 vacuum ports, 1200/1200/1800 mm chamber.

### MPK Production  (id: mpk-production)
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Production-focused oven for small-series manufacturing and larger technical components.
- Key specs: Ambient to 260°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2–10 vacuum ports, 1200/1800/1800 mm chamber.

### MPK Large Format  (id: mpk-large-format)
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Built for oversized moulds, body panels and structural composite parts in demanding workflows.
- Key specs: Ambient to 260°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2–10 vacuum ports, 2400/2000/1800 mm chamber.

### MPK Custom  (id: mpk-custom)
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Engineered around the client's exact part size, curing process, loading method and workflow.
- Key specs: Ambient up to 350°C, ±0.2°C stability, ±0.65°C @ 300°C uniformity, configurable vacuum ports, built-to-spec chamber.

### MPK CS — Control System  (id: mpk-cs)
- Category: Control System
- Industrial touchscreen control unit for composite curing — build, run and monitor multi-stage
  temperature profiles in real time.
- Key specs: Multi-stage ramp/soak/cooling profiles, programmed vs. actual curves, PID control,
  software validation and process monitoring.

### MPK CS + TU — Control + Thermal Unit  (id: mpk-cs-tu)
- Category: Control + Thermal Unit
- Turns a customer's own insulated chamber into a fully controlled composite curing oven with
  integrated heating, airflow and PID control.
- Key specs: Touchscreen control, heating power, air circulation, PID regulation, programmable
  curing profiles, process monitoring.

## Capabilities

- Composite design & development (client design → production-ready part)
- 3D scanning & reverse engineering (scan or existing part → CAD)
- Design for manufacturing (DFM), part-split and mould strategy
- FEA simulation and laminate definition
- Tooling: master models, milled tooling (in-house CNC router & mills), direct moulds, jigs & fixtures
- Composite processes: vacuum infusion, prepreg, compression moulding
- Curing in Telamorph's own MPK ovens (up to 350°C on custom builds)
- Bonding, assembly and finishing: trimming, milling, surface preparation, coating, painting
- First-article inspection and low-to-mid volume series production

Materials worked: carbon fibre, fibreglass, aramid, flax, cores, resin systems, coatings.

## Applications / Sectors

Automotive, motorsport, aerospace, UAVs / drones, industrial equipment, and special
composite applications.

## How to reach us

For product enquiries, quotes, or custom engineering requests:
- Email: sales@telamorph.com (quotes & products) | office@telamorph.com (general)
- Phone: +359 87 747 3737 | +359 89 784 7628
- Address: NPZ Iskar, ul. "Podpolk Vasil Zlatarev", 1000 Sofia, Bulgaria
- Contact form: https://telamorph.com/contact.html
